data.title: Dominion Energy Updates Offshore Wind Project Costs and Timeline
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Dominion Energy ( (D) ) just unveiled an update.

On January 30, 2026, Dominion Energy reported updated cost and timing guidance for its Coastal Virginia Offshore Wind (CVOW) project after a temporary suspension of work stemming from a December 2025 order from the U.S. Department of the Interior’s Bureau of Ocean Energy Management and the impact of tariffs. The estimated total project cost, including contingency but excluding financing, has risen from about $11.2 billion to approximately $11.5 billion, and full project completion is now expected in early 2027, though first power delivery remains targeted for the first quarter of 2026. Dominion said the project is roughly 71% complete, fully permitted at the state and federal levels, and positioned as a key, bipartisan-backed component of Virginia’s energy strategy, delivering nearly 3 GW to support AI and cyber demand, shipbuilding and military installations, while creating about 2,000 U.S. jobs and $2 billion in economic activity, which underscores both its strategic importance and the cost and schedule risks inherent in large offshore wind developments.

The most recent analyst rating on (D) stock is a Hold with a $69.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Dominion Energy stock, see the D Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on D Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, D is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by pressured profitability and significantly negative free cash flow, despite improved leverage. Technicals are supportive with the stock trading above major moving averages and a positive MACD, while earnings commentary and recent legal developments around CVOW are net-positive but tempered by cost increases and execution risks. Valuation is balanced by a strong dividend yield alongside a middling P/E.

To see Spark’s full report on D stock, click here.

More about Dominion Energy

Dominion Energy is a U.S. regulated utility and energy company that generates, transmits and distributes electricity and natural gas, with a growing focus on large-scale clean energy projects such as offshore wind to support regional grid reliability and major demand centers, including data centers and critical military and industrial facilities in Virginia.

Average Trading Volume: 6,221,354

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $51.84B

An update from American Express ( (AXP) ) is now available.

On January 30, 2026, American Express reported that full-year 2025 revenues rose 10% year-over-year to $72.2 billion, driven by higher card member spending, increased net interest income from growth in revolving loan balances, and strong card fee growth, while net income increased to $10.8 billion and earnings per share climbed 10% to $15.38, or 15% on an adjusted basis. Fourth-quarter 2025 results showed similarly robust trends, with total revenues up 10% to $19.0 billion, card member spend up 9% (8% FX-adjusted), and expenses up 10% due largely to higher customer engagement costs and a U.S. Platinum Card refresh, as the company continued to invest in technology and generative AI initiatives, extend key partnerships such as its British Airways cobrand deal, expand its airport lounge network, and announced a planned 16% increase in its quarterly dividend, underscoring management’s confidence in its growth strategy and its positioning in premium payments and small-business card markets.

data.title: New Century Logistics Delays Annual 20-F Filing
data.description:
New Century Logistics (BVI) Ltd. ( (NCEW) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Company and Filing Details:
New Century Logistics (BVI) Limited has filed a Form 12b-25 notifying investors of a delay in submitting its Form 20-F (Yearly Report) for the fiscal year ended September 30, 2025.

Reason for Delay:
The company says it needs more time to review and finalize its financial statements before it can complete the Form 20-F (Yearly Report). The delay is described as procedural, tied to the internal review process, rather than to any specific external shock, auditor change or identified control failure.

Expected Filing Timeline:
New Century Logistics (BVI) Limited expects to file its Form 20-F (Yearly Report) within the standard 15-calendar-day extension period allowed under SEC Rule 12b-25. The company explicitly states it anticipates meeting this extended deadline.

Financial Impact and Statements:
Management indicates it does not expect any significant change in results of operations compared with the prior fiscal year to be reflected in the upcoming annual earnings statements. No preliminary figures are provided, and any expectations about future filing timing and financial results should be viewed as forward-looking and therefore subject to change if new information emerges during the completion of the audit and reporting process.

Next Steps and Signature:
The company notes that all other required SEC periodic reports over the past 12 months have been filed, signaling continued efforts to remain in compliance despite this short delay. The notification is signed on behalf of New Century Logistics (BVI) Limited by Chief Executive Officer Ching Shun Ngan, dated January 30, 2026, underscoring management’s responsibility for and commitment to completing the Form 20-F (Yearly Report) within the extended timeframe.

More about New Century Logistics (BVI) Ltd.

Average Trading Volume: 50,186

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $19.65M

Constellation Acquisition I ( (CSTAF) ) has provided an announcement.

On January 27, 2026, Constellation Acquisition I held a shareholder meeting at which approximately 97.84% of the company’s voting power was represented, providing a quorum for business. Shareholders overwhelmingly approved an extension amendment proposal, with 7,644,519 votes in favor, 1,000 against and no abstentions, while the adjournment proposal was not needed. In connection with the vote, holders of 17,773 Class A ordinary shares elected to redeem their shares for cash at about $13.39 per share, for an aggregate redemption of roughly $238,039. Following these redemptions and an initial $5,000 deposit into the trust account, the trust balance stands at about $628,176, and the company now has 7,646,529 Class A ordinary shares outstanding, of which 46,529 are held by public shareholders.

data.title: Prosperity Bancshares Insider Makes Notable Move in Latest Stock Transaction
data.description:
New insider activity at Prosperity Bancshares ( (PB) ) has taken place on January 29, 2026.

Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Director Ned Holmes has trimmed his stake in Prosperity Bancshares, selling 1,100 shares of the company’s stock in a transaction valued at $73,341.

Recent Updates on PB stock

Over the last 24 hours, trading in Prosperity Bancshares has been dominated by reaction to its newly announced agreement to acquire Stellar Bancorp in a mixed cash-and-stock deal that expands Prosperity’s Houston presence and brings in a high‑quality deposit base while deploying excess capital. Although the strategic logic and long‑term growth potential of the merger are broadly acknowledged, multiple analysts have become more cautious on the near‑term outlook. Piper Sandler’s reduced stance and lower price objective stem from concerns that the price paid for Stellar makes the five‑year tangible book value earn‑back period relatively long, which they believe could limit near‑term share outperformance as investors weigh integration risks and one‑time costs against the strategic benefits. Barclays also trimmed its target, emphasizing that the Stellar acquisition “steals the spotlight” from an otherwise solid Q4 earnings print and that the longer expected earn‑back profile has pressured the stock. Meanwhile, quantitative and AI‑driven assessments remain constructive, citing Prosperity’s strong financial position, profitability, and attractive valuation alongside favorable net interest margin and M&A‑driven growth prospects, but they still flag rising non‑performing assets and integration headwinds as factors tempering upside. Overall, the stock’s recent movement reflects this tug‑of‑war between enthusiasm for the expanded franchise and caution over the cost, payback period, and execution risk of integrating multiple deals at once.

Spark’s Take on PB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PB is a Neutral.

PB scores well on valuation and earnings-call outlook (improving NIM guidance, capital returns, and strategic expansion), supported by solid underlying profitability and a stable balance sheet. The score is held back by weakening technicals (trading below key moving averages) and mixed recent fundamentals (slight revenue decline and weaker free-cash-flow growth), plus credit and integration risks highlighted on the call.

Parke Bancorp’s recent news centered on management commentary from President and CEO Vito Pantilione, who characterized 2025 as a challenging year amid significant macroeconomic and political shifts. He highlighted that the second Trump administration implemented aggressive policy changes—such as new tariffs, expanded gas drilling, stricter border protection, and renewed efforts to curb illegal immigration—alongside rising tensions with the Federal Reserve over the pace of interest-rate cuts. These conditions suggest a more uncertain operating environment for regional banks like Parke, as shifting trade and energy policies and unclear monetary policy timing can affect loan demand, credit quality, and funding costs. data.title: Top Relay Therapeutics Insiders Quietly Cash Out in Coordinated Stock Moves
data.description:
New insider activity at Relay Therapeutics ( (RLAY) ) has taken place on January 29, 2026.

Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Relay Therapeutics has seen a wave of insider selling, with three top executives offloading significant blocks of company stock. President of R&D Donald A. Bergstrom sold 21,581 shares of Relay Therapeutics in a transaction valued at $166,676. Chief Financial Officer Thomas Catinazzo disposed of 15,515 shares, generating proceeds of $119,631. Adding to the activity, Chief Corporate Development Officer Peter Rahmer sold 13,038 shares for a total of $100,473. These combined insider transactions highlight notable profit-taking among the company’s senior leadership.

Recent Updates on RLAY stock

In the last 24 hours, the key development for Relay Therapeutics has been an upgrade by Oppenheimer, which shifted its stance more positively based on competitive dynamics in breast cancer treatments. The firm expects the upcoming VIKTORIA-1 trial readout for rival drug gedatolisib to likely underwhelm market expectations, potentially even failing to show strong median progression-free survival for its triplet regimen. Oppenheimer argues that if gedatolisib delivers anything short of robust “teenage” mPFS, it will set a relatively low efficacy bar that Relay’s competing triplet built around its mutant-selective PI3K inhibitor zovegalisib could surpass. This perceived opportunity for Relay’s pipeline in light of a possible competitor shortfall is the main reason cited for the change in analyst stance and associated price target adjustment, which has been a notable driver of recent trading sentiment in RLAY shares.

Spark’s Take on RLAY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RLAY is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak financial performance—minimal revenue scale, large losses, and substantial ongoing cash burn—partially offset by a low-debt balance sheet. Technicals are mixed but somewhat supportive given the price remains above key longer-term moving averages, while valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no dividend yield.

data.title: Lennar’s Reliance on Land Banks Poses Material Risk to Homebuilding Operations and Financial Performance
data.description:
Lennar Corporation (LEN) has disclosed a new risk, in the Debt & Financing category.

Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Lennar Corporation faces heightened exposure from its reliance on a concentrated group of land banks, including Millrose, to control a significant portion of its land inventory. Because these land banks can pledge the underlying land assets as collateral in secured financing arrangements, lender foreclosures or bankruptcy proceedings could sever Lennar’s access to critical homesites. In a default or insolvency scenario, creditors may obtain the land or reject Lennar’s purchase options, undermining its contractual control over inventory. Such disruptions could delay or prevent home construction and deliveries, materially impairing Lennar’s operations, growth plans, and financial performance.

The average LEN stock price target is $101.18, implying -9.04% downside potential.

To learn more about Lennar Corporation’s risk factors, click here.

Qorvo Inc. faces elevated transaction risk because completion of the proposed mergers with Skyworks is subject to multiple regulatory, shareholder and contractual conditions that lie partly outside either party’s control. Levi Strauss’ growing reliance on artificial intelligence and machine learning, including tools used by its third-party service providers, exposes the company to evolving legal, regulatory and operational risks. Errors, biased outputs, IP infringements or data privacy violations arising from these technologies could result in litigation, regulatory investigations, fines and reputational damage. In addition, tightening global AI and data protection rules may increase compliance costs, and any failure or perceived failure to meet these obligations could adversely affect Levi Strauss’ operations, financial condition and stakeholder trust.

data.title: Nurix Therapeutics Exposed to Significant Foreign Exchange Risk Amid Unhedged Currency Exposure
data.description:
Nurix Therapeutics, Inc. (NRIX) has disclosed a new risk, in the Capital Markets category.

Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Nurix Therapeutics, Inc. faces meaningful foreign exchange risk as it incurs a portion of its expenses, and may in the future earn revenues, in multiple currencies. Its reported results of operations and cash flows could fluctuate materially when translated into U.S. dollars if exchange rates move adversely. This risk could increase if a larger share of its cost base or revenue stream becomes denominated in foreign currencies or if U.S. government actions drive further volatility in the dollar’s relative value. Since the company does not currently hedge its currency exposure, it remains fully vulnerable to potentially adverse foreign exchange movements, which could negatively impact its business, financial condition, operating results, and prospects.

Overall, Wall Street has a Strong Buy consensus rating on NRIX stock based on 14 Buys.

data.title: Concentrix Faces Heightened Goodwill Impairment Risk That Could Materially Weaken Financial Results
data.description:
Concentrix Corporation (CNXC) has disclosed a new risk, in the Accounting & Financial Operations category.

Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Concentrix Corporation faces a heightened risk that impairment charges on goodwill, which comprises a significant portion of its total assets, could materially weaken its financial condition and consolidated results of operations. Because goodwill arises from past acquisitions and is tested for impairment at least annually or when triggering events occur, adverse industry or economic trends, business disruptions, integration challenges, divestitures, shifts in asset use, or sustained declines in market capitalization may lead to write-downs. This risk is particularly acute in the years immediately following acquisitions, when the gap between a reporting unit’s carrying value and fair value is narrow, meaning even modest declines in fair value can result in material impairment charges. Similar to the impairment recorded for the fiscal year ended November 30, 2025, any future goodwill impairments tied to existing or new acquisitions could negatively impact Concentrix Corporation’s earnings and volatility of reported results.

The average CNXC stock price target is $62.00, implying 60.54% upside potential.

To learn more about Concentrix Corporation’s risk factors, click here.

United Rentals’ increasing reliance on AI in its products, services, and internal operations exposes it to a range of strategic, operational, and compliance risks that could adversely affect performance.
